findings.evidence: TauCeti grep: line 328 defines `norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_mul_of_norm_le`; line 341 proves the same-radius lemma exactly by applying it.
findings.fix: Remove the same-radius lemma and use `h.norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_mul_of_norm_le hx hη hξ` at call sites.
findings.issue: `norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_mul_of_norm_le_same_radius` is only the `R = S` specialization of the new general `norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_mul_of_norm_le`.

findings.evidence: TauCeti grep: line 328 defines `norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_mul_of_norm_le`; line 349 proves the unit-radius lemma by `simpa using h.norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_mul_of_norm_le hx hη hξ`.
findings.fix: Remove the unit-vector lemma and specialize the general radius lemma with `R = S = 1` when needed.
findings.issue: `norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_of_norm_le_one` is only the unit-radius specialization of `norm_point_matrixBilinearForm_le_mul_of_norm_le`.

summary: The core operator-norm wrapper is not directly replaced by Mathlib, but the PR adds several redundant special-case TauCeti lemmas that duplicate the immediately preceding general API.
